name: Dublin Lawyer (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lobster in two down the center. Remove all the meat, including claws.
Retain the shell for serving.
2. Cut the meat into chunks.
3. Heat the butter until it begins to foam. Quickly sauté the lobster chunks,
just until they are cooked but not colored.
4. Warm the whiskey slightly.
5. Pour the whiskey over the lobster and carefully ignite it.
6. Add the cream, mixing with the pan juices.
7. Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed.
8. Return the lobster to the half shells and serve hot.
